subject: Meeting Reminder - 11:00 PM Today
body:
Hi Muhammad Saleem,

This is a friendly reminder that we have a meeting scheduled for today at 11:00 PM.

Please make sure you're available at that time.

Looking forward to speaking with you.

Best regards,
Agentic Sphere Team

subject: Meeting Reminder - 11:00 PM Today
body:
السلام علیکم

یہ آپ کو یاد دلانے کے لیے ہے کہ آپ کے پاس آج رات 11:00 بجے ایک میٹنگ ہے۔

📅 میٹنگ کی تفصیلات:
⏰ وقت: آج رات 11:00 PM
📍 براہ کرم وقت پر موجود رہیں

---

Hello,

This is a reminder that you have a meeting scheduled for today at 11:00 PM.

📅 Meeting Details:
⏰ Time: Today at 11:00 PM
📍 Please be on time

والسلام علیکم
